backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: updating the WhatsApp order message formatter in `whatsappOrder.ts` and ensuring `CheckoutModal.tsx` uses the same corrected message format with full item names, no emojis, and exact section structure.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file setting up Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags for Healthy Yummy Bites in Adampur, Punjab, preloads the hero image and Poppins font, and mounts the React app at `#root`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component that wires together cart state, checkout modal, and cart panel; handles order submission by opening a WhatsApp URL and clears the cart only when the user closes the confirmation modal.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying a business description paragraph and three feature cards (Fresh Ingredients, Made with Love, Great Taste) with orange icon circles.
frontend/src/components/CartIcon.tsx: Fixed top-right cart icon button that shows a red badge with the total item count from CartContext.
frontend/src/components/CartPanel.tsx: Slide-in cart panel (bottom sheet on mobile, right drawer on desktop) displaying cart items with quantity controls, remove buttons, and a place-order action.
frontend/src/components/CheckoutModal.ts: A modal component that collects customer name, phone, and address for checkout, validates the form, then shows an order confirmation screen with a copyable order summary message built via `buildOrderMessage`.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Displays the restaurant's contact information (location, phone numbers, hours) in styled cards and provides WhatsApp and call action buttons.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer showing the restaurant name, location, WhatsApp order link, primary/secondary phone numbers, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/GallerySection.t: Renders a responsive image gallery grid of five food category photos (burgers, pizza, shakes, wraps, fries) with hover overlay title effects.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, restaurant branding, and two CTA buttons to order on WhatsApp or scroll to the menu.
frontend/src/components/MenuSection.tsx: Displays categorized menu items from `menuData` with add-to-cart buttons (supporting single and dual pricing for items like pizza) and brief visual feedback on add.
A bold call-to-action banner section with WhatsApp order and phone call buttons, styled with an orange gradient background and decorative blur elements.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Renders a static customer reviews section with three hardcoded testimonials, each displayed in a card with a 5-star rating.
frontend/src/components/StickyOrderButto: Renders a mobile-only sticky bottom bar with two call buttons and a WhatsApp order button linking to specific phone numbers.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for cart state management with add, remove, update, and clear operations, persisting cart data to localStorage.
frontend/src/data/menuData.ts: Exports a static array of menu categories (shakes, burgers, pizza, etc.) with items and prices for the restaurant menu.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/utilities, CSS custom properties for a warm café color palette, and utility classes for glassmorphism, shadows, and 3D effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappOrder.ts: Utility functions to build a plain-text order message and generate a WhatsApp deep-link URL pre-filled with customer and cart details.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch), border radii, box shadows, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for 'Healthy Yummy Bites' food ordering app, documenting existing features around fixing the WhatsApp order message format (no emojis, exact item names, specific structure) and the matching checkout modal clipboard content.
